raw_cv_text:
Amara Okafor-Silva
+44 7700 123456 | Email: amara.okafor@gmail.com | LinkedIn: amara-okafor-silva | GitHub: AmaraOkaforSilva |
https://amara.dev
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | BSc Computer Science with Distinction 2018-2021
Achieved 3.89/4.0 GPA with First-class honors; awarded the Anglo-German Scholarship for
academic excellence in human-computer interaction
Led the Imperial Web Development Society (150+ members), organizing weekly design system
workshops and mentoring 8 junior developers in component-driven architecture
ETH Zurich | MSc Computer Science (Systems Track) with Summa Cum Laude 2021-2023
3.95/4.0 cumulative GPA; thesis on 'Performance Optimizations in Token-Based Design Systems'
published in ACM CHI workshop proceedings
Teaching assistant for UI Engineering seminar across 2 semesters; mentored cohort of 45 students
with 94% positive feedback rating
EXPERIENCE
Figma | Senior Frontend Engineer, Design Systems 2023-Present
Architected and shipped the Components v2 system supporting 40+ primitive component types and
500+ compound variants; reduced bundle size by 28% (from 340KB to 245KB gzip) and decreased
time-to-interactive by 340ms across 12M+ monthly active users
Led design system adoption initiative across 8 product teams (120+ engineers), achieving 87%
component reuse rate (+34% YoY); implemented automated accessibility auditing reducing WCAG
violations by 91% (from 2.3K to 210 issues)
Designed and open-sourced component API surface and tooling; contributed Storybook integration
reducing setup time from 4 hours to 12 minutes; library fork rate grew 2,100+ GitHub stars in 8
months
Stripe | Frontend Engineer II, Platform Design 2022-2023
Built token-driven theming engine supporting 15+ dark/light mode variants and RTL layouts;
eliminated 47KB dead CSS and reduced theme application latency by 56ms (measured at p95) across
8 merchant dashboards serving 500K+ businesses
Implemented comprehensive Storybook documentation for 220+ reusable components with
interactive props panels; improved design-to-dev handoff velocity by 6.2 days per sprint for team of
9; component discovery metrics showed 73% increased reuse
Shipped CSS-in-JS migration (styled-components → vanilla-extract) across 12 feature modules;
improved build times by 2.1 minutes (18% reduction) and reduced runtime style computation
overhead by 43%; zero breaking changes across 800+ component consumers
Cloudflare | Frontend Engineer, Developer Experience 2021-2022
Led cross-team UI component library standardization initiative; consolidated 340 duplicate
components into unified 85-component system; achieved 76% code deduplication and 2.3MB bundle
savings across 15+ internal dashboards
Developed TypeScript-first component API with runtime prop validation and compile-time type
checking; reduced component-related bugs by 64% (from 18 monthly incidents to 6.5) and improved
developer experience NPS from 34 to 71
Mentored cohort of 4 junior frontend engineers on design systems fundamentals and component
composition patterns; 100% of mentees promoted or received significant project ownership within 12
months
Wise (formerly TransferWise) | Frontend Engineer, UI Patterns 2020-2021
Built foundational design system documentation site using Gatsby and MDX supporting 12 design
tokens categories with live code examples; improved onboarding time for new frontend hires by 4.8
days and reduced design-dev sync meetings by 62%
Implemented automated visual regression testing suite with Percy integration across 180 components;
caught 43 unintended style regressions pre-production and achieved 100% test coverage on design
system core module
Shipped responsive grid system and layout primitives supporting 6 breakpoints; powered redesign of
8 product surfaces with 31% improvement in mobile user engagement and 12% reduction in mobile
interaction latency
PROJECTS
TokenForge | TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL, Figma Plugin API 2023-Present
Open-source design token generation and synchronization tool bridging Figma tokens to code (CSS,
SCSS, JSON); 890 GitHub stars, 45K+ npm downloads/month, adopted by 20+ companies including
2 Series-B funded startups
Implemented bidirectional token sync engine with conflict resolution; plugin reduces token extraction
workflow from 2.5 hours to 8 minutes; analyzed performance showed 94% reduction in manual token
management overhead for design teams
Chromatic | React, CSS Modules, Webpack 5, Jest, Storybook 7.0 2022-2023
Comprehensive accessible React component library for typography-heavy applications; 12.3K
GitHub stars, featured in Awesome React list; 127K npm downloads across 3-month span with
4.9/5.0 rating
Engineered automated accessibility compliance suite catching WCAG 2.1 AA violations; all 56
components ship with axe-core audits and manual testing docs; zero accessibility issues reported in
production across 2 years
DesignOps Dashboard | Next.js 13, TailwindCSS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Vercel 2021-2022
Full-stack metrics platform tracking design system adoption KPIs and component usage analytics;
156 GitHub stars, 3.2K unique monthly visitors; powers internal Figma design metrics at previous
employer
Optimized dashboard queries reducing page load P95 latency from 3.4s to 680ms (80%
improvement); implemented serverless functions handling 2.1M monthly metric ingestion events with
$127/month AWS cost
TypeScale Generator | React, Web Workers, Canvas API, Vite 2020-2021
Interactive tool for generating typographic scales based on mathematical ratios; 2,847 GitHub stars,
89K+ total visits, widely shared in design systems community; featured in CSS-Tricks and Smashing
Magazine
Implemented Web Worker-based rendering engine processing 12,000+ scale variations in <200ms;
optimized memory usage by 73% through lazy-loaded canvas rendering
EXTRACURRICULAR
Design Systems Conference (DSConf) | Speaker & Steering Committee Member 2022-Present
Keynote speaker at DSConf 2023 ('Scaling Design Systems for 500+ Engineers'); presentation
reached 3,200+ live attendees and 14.7K views on YouTube within 6 weeks; post-event feedback
4.7/5.0 stars (n=687)
Steering committee member curating talks and workshops; led selection process for 28 talks from 156
submissions; coordinated 12-month speaker mentorship program elevating 6 emerging voices in
design systems community
Open Source Maintainer, Storybook Project | Core Contributor & Design Systems 2021-
Champion Present
Merged 87+ pull requests and triaged 2,300+ issues across 3 years; maintained design systems
documentation resulting in 48% reduction in support questions on Storybook discussions; 1.2M+
total GitHub stars for Storybook ecosystem
Established 'Design Systems Addon' initiative shipping 4 major feature releases; adoption by 28% of
Storybook user base (estimated 340K+ monthly active projects); mentored 7 contributors to
maintainer status
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – TypeScript, JavaScript (ES2023+), HTML5, CSS3/SCSS, GraphQL, SQL
Technologies – React 18+, Next.js, Storybook 7+, Figma, CSS-in-JS (styled-components, vanilla-
extract), Web Components, Vite, Webpack 5, Node.js, Web Accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA/AAA)
Tools – Git, GitHub, Figma, VS Code, Playwright, Jest, Vitest, Percy, Chromatic, Chrome DevTools,
Lighthouse, Axe DevTools, Datadog, Sentry, ESLint, Prettier
name: Email
